AI Chatbot Development

Custom AI-powered chatbots for your website, WhatsApp, or Facebook that qualify leads, answer questions, and book appointments — automatically, around the clock.

Turn your WhatsApp into a 24/7 sales and support machine. Automated replies, lead nurturing sequences, appointment confirmations, and CRM sync — all on autopilot.

I specialize in industries where speed, responsiveness, and follow-up are the difference between winning and losing a deal.

Real Estate

Never lose a lead again. Your AI chatbot instantly responds to property inquiries, qualifies buyer intent, and books viewings — even at midnight.

  • Property search & filtering bot
  • Automated viewing scheduling
  • CRM sync with agent assignment
  • Follow-up sequences for cold leads

Proven Results

Real Projects.
Real Results.

Every case study below reflects a real automation challenge — and the measurable outcome delivered.

🏢
Real Estate — Dubai

24/7 Lead Capture & Viewing Bot

🔴 Problem

A Dubai real estate agency was losing 60%+ of after-hours leads because no agent was available to respond. WhatsApp inquiries sat unread for hours.

🔵 Solution

Built a WhatsApp AI chatbot that instantly responds, qualifies buyer intent (budget, location, type), and books viewing appointments directly into the agent's calendar.

🟢 Result
4× Leads

Response time dropped from 4 hours to 3 seconds. Lead qualification improved. 4× more qualified viewings booked per month.

💆
Aesthetic Clinic — Abu Dhabi

Booking & No-Show Reduction System

🔴 Problem

A cosmetic clinic had a 35% no-show rate costing thousands monthly. Staff spent hours manually calling patients to confirm appointments.

🔵 Solution

Deployed a WhatsApp automation sequence: 48-hour reminder, 3-hour reminder, and instant rescheduling option — all automated. Zero staff intervention needed.

🟢 Result
−62% No-Shows

No-show rate dropped from 35% to 13%. Staff reclaimed 15 hours per week. Monthly revenue increased by AED 22,000.

🛍️
E-commerce — Sharjah

Abandoned Cart WhatsApp Recovery

🔴 Problem

An online fashion store was losing 75% of potential sales to cart abandonment with no recovery system. Email recovery campaigns had under 8% open rates.

🔵 Solution

Built a 3-step WhatsApp recovery sequence: instant reminder, 10% discount offer after 24 hours, and final "last chance" message at 72 hours — fully automated.

🟢 Result
+38% Revenue

Cart recovery rate hit 34% (vs 8% email). WhatsApp open rate: 94%. Monthly revenue increase of 38% within 60 days of launch.

📱
Marketing Agency — Dubai

Instagram DM Lead Automation

🔴 Problem

A digital marketing agency's client was spending AED 15,000/month on Instagram ads but manually responding to DMs hours later — losing hot leads to competitors.

🔵 Solution

Built an Instagram DM bot triggered by ad comments and DMs. Bot qualifies leads, captures contact info, and transfers hot leads to WhatsApp in under 60 seconds.

🟢 Result
−55% CPL

Cost per lead dropped 55%. Qualified leads increased 3×. Client renewed contract for 3 additional months and referred 2 new clients to the agency.

🔐
Security Company — UAE

Incident Reporting & Escalation Bot

🔴 Problem

A facilities management company had no standardized incident reporting system. Guards used WhatsApp manually — reports were inconsistent, delayed, and often lost.

🔵 Solution

Built a Botpress chatbot integrated with Make.com: guards report via chat, system auto-classifies severity, creates tickets, alerts the right manager, and logs everything.

🟢 Result
100% Logged

Zero incidents missed. Response time for critical events dropped from 22 minutes to under 3 minutes. Full audit trail for compliance reporting.

🏨
Hotel Group — Dubai

Guest Experience Automation

🔴 Problem

A boutique hotel group struggled with low Google review scores and lacked a system to gather guest feedback before they left and posted negative reviews publicly.

🔵 Solution

Created a WhatsApp bot sent at checkout: collects satisfaction score, routes happy guests to Google Reviews, and routes unhappy guests to management for immediate resolution.

🟢 Result
4.2→4.8★

Google rating improved from 4.2 to 4.8 stars in 90 days. Negative reviews reduced by 78%. 5-star reviews tripled. Direct bookings increased 22%.

About Me

I Turn Manual Work
Into Automated Revenue

With 4 years of hands-on experience building automation systems for UAE businesses — from real estate agencies and clinics to security firms and e-commerce brands — I've seen firsthand what happens when businesses respond in 3 seconds instead of 3 hours.

My background spans Botpress chatbot development, Make.com workflow automation, WhatsApp Business API, and ManyChat social automation. I've worked within the UAE's unique business environment, understanding both the technical requirements and the cultural nuances that make automation actually work here.

I don't just build bots — I build systems that consistently capture leads, follow up automatically, and integrate seamlessly with the tools your team already uses.

Botpress Make.com WhatsApp Business API ManyChat n8n Zapier HubSpot CRM Google Workspace Airtable Jira Automation
